title: Chamaeriphes coriacea
uses: Chamaeriphes coriacea is known to have various traditional medicinal uses, although it is not well-researched or widely used in modern medicine. In some cultures, it has been used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant's extracts have also been studied for their potential antimicrobial properties, which could help combat infections. However, more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness for these purposes. As with many traditional medicinal plants, caution should be exercised when using Chamaeriphes coriacea due to potential side effects or interactions with other medications.
